description: A compliance audit has flagged the production database 'sakila_prod' as having unauthorized schema changes compared to the approved reference 'sakila_gold'. Your goal is to identify these changes and revert 'sakila_prod' to match 'sakila_gold' exactly, without losing any live transaction data. Connect to the local MySQL server (user: ga, password: password123). Generate a synchronization SQL script to revert the schema drifts in 'sakila_prod' and save it to '/home/ga/Documents/sql_scripts/revert_drift.sql'. Execute the script to apply the fixes. Do NOT drop and recreate the 'sakila_prod' database, as it contains live rental transactions that must be preserved.
